message:
fix: prevent arrow key carousel navigation when input is focused

Between sm-md breakpoints, both search and carousel are visible.
Arrow keys in search input would incorrectly also change carousel slides.
Added input focus check to carousel keyboard handler.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
